---
title: "npp_utils.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Cloud Run utilities for downloading inputs, running NPP calculations, and publishing outputs.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/src/npp_utils.py >}}
```

:::
